# Task Completion Template

## File Purpose
- What this file is: A reusable Markdown template for summarizing completed work.
- Why it exists: It standardizes handoff notes for humans and AI across implementation sessions.
- How AI agents will use it: AI agents should use this template when a task needs a structured completion summary or handoff artifact.

## Maintenance Instructions
- When to update it: Update when the team wants different completion-report sections or stronger handoff expectations.
- Who updates it: Humans define the reporting standard; AI may keep the template current with actual workflow usage.
- How it relates to other docs: This template complements tasks.md by capturing richer context after work is done.
